name: Choko
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Choko, a traditional stick game from the Gambia River valley (Mandinka/Fula). Drop 12 men on a 5x5 board or move them one step orthogonally; jump an adjacent enemy to capture it AND remove a second enemy man of your choice. Its signature is the drop initiative: whenever you place a man by choice, your opponent must answer with a placement. Capture all enemy men to win.
